checks.notes: Chamfered edges are visible in the top-right corner area of the top view and front view, and confirmed in the isometric view showing angled/beveled geometry at the catch hook end

checks.feature: wall thickness visible (part should appear hollow/shelled, not solid)
checks.notes: The part appears to be a solid body rather than a shelled/hollow part. No clear wall thickness or hollow interior is visible in any of the three views. The cross-section appears filled solid.

issues: Part appears solid rather than shelled/hollow - no visible wall thickness

The catch hook geometry at the right end appears present but is difficult to clearly distinguish as a proper hook profile
Pivot pin hole (circle visible in top view at approximately x=-10) appears to be present and roughly 4mm diameter which matches specification
Overall length appears to span from x=-15 to x=15 which is 30mm, matching the specification
